calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner, Lai Ching Wong, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Jenny Ka Shui Yee, who also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Consent of the minor's father, Fuk Kei Yee, to the name change was filed today, April 17, 2008.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Joey Ka Shui Yee.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Reset To Apr-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioner, Lai Ching Wong, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor, Jenny Ka Shui Yee.

Lacks the Minor's Father consent and or proof of service of notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor: Jenny Ka Shui Yee, is continued to April 17, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.

Petitioner directed to seek further guidance in this matter at the Access Center.
